---
title: "01_Wrangling"
author: "Matheus Ardigueri"
date: "2026-01-27"
output: html_document
---

# 1) Setup
```{r Loading Packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#install.packages("glmnet")

library(readxl) # to read excel files
library(janitor) # to clean data
library(dplyr) # wrangling
library(tidyr) # wrangling
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(glmnet)
library(randomForest)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)
#install.packages("corrplot")
library(corrplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggcorrplot)
library(caret)
#install.packages("ranger")
library(ranger)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r Loading Dataset with images, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ponder <- read.csv("../Data/2024_reflectance.csv", sep = ";")


ponder
```

```{r Cleaning Colum Names}
clean_ponder <- ponder %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(across(8:ncol(.), as.numeric)) %>%
  select(-cultivar_id)

clean_ponder

```

```{r}
ponder_long <- clean_ponder %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(phys_vars), as.numeric)) %>%
  mutate(dap = as.factor(dap)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(phys_vars),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("b_"),
    names_to = "band",
    values_to = "reflectance"
  )
```



# 2) Data view 
# 2.1) Boxplots

```{r Combined Plot For Dates Collected in 2024}

# Main plot
phys_vars <- c("ca", "cb", "cx_c", "pn", "gs", "etr")

ponder_long_2024 <- clean_ponder %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(phys_vars), as.numeric)) %>%
  mutate(dap = as.factor(dap)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(phys_vars),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  filter(year == 2024)
  

variable_labels_f <- c(
  gs = "Stomata Cond. (mol m-2s-1)",
  pn = "Net Photo (µmol m-2s-1)",
  etr = "ETR (µmol m-2s-1)",
  ca = "Chl.a (µg/cm-2)",
  cb = "Chl.b (µg/cm-2)",
  cx_c = "Car (µg/cm-2)"
)

bp_physilog_only_selected_dates <- ggplot(
  ponder_long_2024,
  aes(
    x = dap,
    y = value,
    fill = treatment,
    group = interaction(dap, treatment)
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(variable = variable_labels_f))+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(name = "Treatments") +
  xlab("Days After Planting") +
  labs(fill = "Treatments") +
  ylab("Physiological Variables Values")+
  theme_light() +
  theme(
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", face = "bold"), 
  legend.position = c(0.945,0.59), 
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10), angle = 90),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 10)),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15)),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"))

    

# Combine plots


bp_physilog_only_selected_dates

#Save

# ggsave(
#  filename = "../Output/Boxplots/2024_bp_phys.png",
#   plot = bp_physilog_only_selected_dates,
#   dpi = 300,
#   height = 10,
#   width = 16
# )

```

```{r Combined Plot For Dates Collected in 2025}
ponder_long_2025 <- clean_ponder %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(phys_vars), as.numeric)) %>%
  mutate(dap = as.factor(dap)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(phys_vars),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  filter(year == 2025)

bp_physilog_only_selected_dates_25 <- ggplot(
  ponder_long_2025,
  aes(
    x = dap,
    y = value,
    fill = treatment,
    group = interaction(dap, treatment)
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(variable = variable_labels_f))+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(name = "Treatments") +
  xlab("Days After Planting") +
  labs(fill = "Treatments") +
  ylab("Physiological Variables Values")+
  theme_light() +
  theme(
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", face = "bold"), 
  legend.position = c(0.945,0.59), 
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10), angle = 90),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 10)),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15)),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"))

    

# Combine plots


bp_physilog_only_selected_dates_25

# Save
# ggsave(
#  filename = "../Output/Boxplots/2025_bp_phys.png",
#   plot = bp_physilog_only_selected_dates_25,
#   dpi = 300,
#   height = 10,
#   width = 16
# )
```

```{r Wrangling to combine cultivars and analyze individual relations}
ponder_cult_spec <- clean_ponder %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(phys_vars),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  )

names(ponder_long_2024$genotype)
```

```{r Boxplot phys x cultivars}

bp_phys_cult <- ggplot(
  ponder_long_2024,
  aes(
    x = genotype,
    y = value,
    fill = treatment,
    group = interaction(genotype, treatment)
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y",
             labeller = labeller(variable = variable_labels_f))+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(name = "Treatments") +
  xlab("Genotype") +
  labs(fill = "Treatments") +
  ylab("Physiological Variables Values")+
  theme_light() +
  theme(
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", face = "bold"), 
  legend.position = c(0.945,0.59), 
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10), angle = 90),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 10)),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15)),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"))



bp_phys_cult

# ggsave(bp_phys_cult,
#        filename= "../Output/Boxplots/bp_phys_cult_2024.png",
#        height = 10,
#        width = 16)



```

```{r}
bp_phys_cults25 <- ggplot(
  ponder_long_2025,
  aes(
    x = genotype,
    y = value,
    fill = treatment,          # DAP as discrete for legend/colors
    group = interaction( genotype, treatment)
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot(
    linewidth = 1,
    position = position_dodge2(width = 0.85, preserve = "single")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ variable,
    scales = "free_y",
    labeller = labeller(variable = variable_labels_f)
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(name = "Treatment") +
  guides(
    linetype = guide_legend(order = 2)
  ) +
  xlab("Genotype") +
  ylab("Physiological Variables Values") +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", face = "bold"),
    legend.position = c(0.15, 0.07),
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold",
                                margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10), angle = 90),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold",
                                margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 10)),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold",
                                margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold",
                                margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15))
  )

bp_phys_cults25

# ggsave(
#   bp_phys_cults25,
#   filename = "../Output/Boxplots/bp_phys_cults255.png",
#        height = 10,
#        width = 16
# )
```

```{r}
bp_phys_cults24 <- ggplot(
  ponder_long_2024,
  aes(
    x = genotype,
    y = value,
    fill = factor(dap),          # DAP as discrete for legend/colors
    linetype = treatment,
    group = interaction(dap, genotype, treatment)
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot(
    linewidth = 1,
    position = position_dodge2()
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ variable,
    scales = "free_y",
    labeller = labeller(variable = variable_labels_f)
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(name = "DAP") +
  scale_linetype_discrete(name = "Treatment") +
  guides(
    fill     = guide_legend(order = 1),
    linetype = guide_legend(order = 2)
  ) +
  xlab("Genotype") +
  ylab("Physiological Variables Values") +
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", face = "bold"),
    legend.position = c(0.15, 0.07),
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold",
                                margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10), angle = 90),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold",
                                margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 10)),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold",
                                margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold",
                                margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15))
  )

bp_phys_cults24

# ggsave(
#   bp_phys_cults24,
#   filename = "../Output/Boxplots/bp_phys_cults24.png",
#        height = 11,
#        width = 18,
#   dpi = 900
# )
```

```{r Combined Plot for All Dates}
# bp_all_physiolog_dates <- ggplot(

#   axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15)),

#   legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"))

# bp_all_physiolog_dates

# ggsave(
#   filename = "../Output/Boxplots/Physiology_alldates_boxplots.png",
#   plot = bp_all_physiolog_dates,
#   dpi = 300,
#   width = 13,
#   height = 10
# )
```

# 3) Spectral Curves
```{r Converting Bands to Wavelength and Grouping by to Calculate Mean}
wavelengths <- seq(400, 1000, length.out = 300)

df_avg_24 <- clean_ponder %>%
  filter(year == 2024) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("b_"),
    names_to = "band",
    values_to = "reflectance"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    band_num = as.numeric(str_remove(band, "b_")),
    wavelength = wavelengths[band_num]
  ) %>% 
  group_by(treatment, genotype, wavelength) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_reflectance = mean(reflectance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

df_avg_25 <- clean_ponder %>%
  filter(year == 2025) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("b_"),
    names_to = "band",
    values_to = "reflectance"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    band_num = as.numeric(str_remove(band, "b_")),
    wavelength = wavelengths[band_num]
  ) %>% 
  group_by(treatment, genotype, wavelength) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_reflectance = mean(reflectance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


```

```{r Naming Different Contrasted Colors}
cultivar_colors <- c(
  "#0072B2",  # blue
  "#E69F00",  # orange
  "#009E73",  # bluish green
  "#56B4E9",  # sky blue
  "#D55E00",  # vermillion
  "#CC79A7",  # purple
  "#F0E442",  # yellow (safe contrast)
  "#999999",  # gray
  "black"  ) # black

all_cultivars <- sort(unique(c(
  df_avg_24$genotype,
  df_avg_25$genotype
)))

# If you don't have enough colors, repeat or expand palette
if (length(all_cultivars) > length(cultivar_colors)) {
  cultivar_colors <- rep(cultivar_colors, length.out = length(all_cultivars))
}

# Assign names consistently
names(cultivar_colors) <- all_cultivars
```

```{r Creating Reflectance Plot plot for each different cultivar 2024}
# B = 400
# G = 550
# R = 660

p_ref_facet_cultivar_24 <- df_avg_24 %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = wavelength,
    y = mean_reflectance,
    color = treatment
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 450, colour = "blue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 550, color = "green") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 660, color = "red") +
  scale_color_viridis_d() +
  facet_wrap(~ genotype, nrow = 3, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = element_blank(),
    x = "Wavelength (nm)",
    y = "Reflectance values",
    color = "Treatment"
  ) +
  theme_gray() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", face = "bold"), 
  legend.position = c(0.92, 0.12), 
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  ylab("Reflectance"),
  xlab("Wavelength (nm)"),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10)),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 10)),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15)),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"))

p_ref_facet_cultivar_24

# ggsave(
#   plot = p_ref_facet_cultivar_24,
#   filename = "../Output/Spectral/p_ref_facet_cultivar_24.png",
#   dpi = 600,
#   width = 16,
#   height = 13
# )

```

```{r Creating Reflectance Plot plot for each different cultivar 2025}
p_ref_facet_cultivar_25 <- df_avg_25 %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = wavelength,
    y = mean_reflectance,
    color = treatment
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  
  scale_color_viridis_d() +
  facet_wrap(~ genotype, nrow = 3, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = element_blank(),
    x = "Wavelength (nm)",
    y = "Reflectance values",
    color = "Treatment"
  ) +
  theme_gray() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 450, colour = "blue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 550, color = "green") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 660, color = "red") +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", face = "bold"), 
  legend.position = c(0.92, 0.12), 
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  ylab("Reflectance"),
  xlab("Wavelength (nm)"),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10)),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 10)),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15)),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"))

p_ref_facet_cultivar_25

# ggsave(
#   plot = p_ref_facet_cultivar_25,
#   filename = "../Output/Spectral/p_ref_facet_cultivar_25.png",
#   dpi = 600,
#   width = 16,
#   height = 13
# )
```


```{r Creating Reflectance Plot plot for each different cultivar zoomed in 24}
p_spec_zoom_24 <- df_avg_24 %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = wavelength,
    y = mean_reflectance,
    color = treatment
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_color_viridis_d() +
  facet_wrap(~ genotype, nrow = 3, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = element_blank(),
    x = "Wavelength (nm)",
    y = "Reflectance values",
    color = "Treatment"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(740, 1000)) +
  theme_gray() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", face = "bold"), 
  legend.position = c(0.92, 0.12), 
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  ylab("Reflectance"),
  xlab("Wavelength (nm)"),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10)),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 10)),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15)),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"))

p_spec_zoom_24

# ggsave(
#   plot = p_spec_zoom_24,
#   filename = "../Output/Spectral/p_spec_zoom_24.png",
#   dpi = 600,
#   width = 16,
#   height = 13
# )

```

```{r Creating Reflectance Plot plot for each different cultivar zoomed in 25}
p_spec_zoom_25 <- df_avg_25 %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = wavelength,
    y = mean_reflectance,
    color = treatment
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_color_viridis_d() +
  facet_wrap(~ genotype, nrow = 3, ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    title = element_blank(),
    x = "Wavelength (nm)",
    y = "Reflectance values",
    color = "Treatment"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(740, 1000)) +
  theme_gray() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", face = "bold"), 
  legend.position = c(0.92, 0.12), 
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  ylab("Reflectance"),
  xlab("Wavelength (nm)"),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10)),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 10)),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15)),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"))

p_spec_zoom_25

# ggsave(
#   plot = p_spec_zoom_25,
#   filename = "../Output/Spectral/p_spec_zoom_25.png",
#   dpi = 600,
#   width = 16,
#   height = 13
# )

```

```{r Separating treatment in plots and cultivars as HUE}
p_combined_irrigation_2_plots <- df_avg_24 %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = wavelength,
    y = mean_reflectance,
    color = genotype
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ treatment, nrow = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cultivar_colors) +
  labs(
    title = element_blank(),
    x = "Wavelength (nm)",
    y = "Reflectance values",
    color = "Cultivar"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(740, 1000)) +   # Zoom into Red Edge + NIR (Remove for whole graph)
  theme_light() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", face = "bold"), 
  legend.position = c(0.89, 0.20), 
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10)),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 10)),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15)),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"))

p_combined_irrigation_2_plots

# ggsave(
#   filename = "../Output/Spectral_plots/Reflectance_curves_by_treatments_zoom_NIR.png",
#   plot = p_combined_irrigation_2_plots,
#   dpi = 600,
#   width = 13,
#   height = 10
# )

```
```{r Suport function and setup to spectral graphs by date.}
make_mean_spectra <- function(df, target_year, wavelengths_vec) {
  df %>%
    filter(year == target_year) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = starts_with("b_"),
      names_to = "band",
      values_to = "reflectance"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      band_num = as.numeric(str_remove(band, "b_")),
      wavelength = wavelengths_vec[band_num]
    ) %>%
    group_by(year, dap, treatment, genotype, wavelength) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_reflectance = mean(reflectance, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

spectra_mean_2024 <- make_mean_spectra(clean_ponder, 2024, wavelengths)
spectra_mean_2025 <- make_mean_spectra(clean_ponder, 2025, wavelengths)

spectra_mean_2024 <- spectra_mean_2024 %>%
  filter(dap != 75) %>%
  droplevels()
spectra_mean_2024 <- spectra_mean_2024 %>%
  mutate(dap = factor(dap, levels = sort(unique(dap))))

spectra_mean_2025 <- spectra_mean_2025 %>%
  mutate(dap = factor(dap, levels = sort(unique(dap))))
```

```{r Combined Grid 24}
p_combined_irrigation_grid_2024 <- spectra_mean_2024 %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = wavelength,
    y = mean_reflectance,
    color = genotype
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  facet_grid(treatment ~ dap,
             labeller = labeller(
    dap = function(x) paste("DAP", x)
  )) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cultivar_colors) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(400, 1000)) +
  theme_gray() +
  labs(
    title = element_blank(),
    x = "Wavelength (nm)",
    y = "Reflectance values",
    color = "Genotype"
  ) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", face = "bold"), 
  legend.position = c(0.925, 0.12), 
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10)),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 10)),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15)),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"))

p_combined_irrigation_grid_2024

# ggsave(plot = p_combined_irrigation_grid_2024,
#        filename = "../Output/Spectral/combined_irrigation_DAP_24.png",
#        dpi = 600,
#        width = 18,
#       height = 13
#        )

```

```{r Combined Grid 25}
p_combined_irrigation_grid_2025 <- spectra_mean_2025 %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = wavelength,
    y = mean_reflectance,
    color = genotype
  )) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = element_blank(),
    x = "Wavelength (nm)",
    y = "Reflectance values",
    color = "Genotype"
  ) +
  facet_grid(treatment ~ dap,
             labeller = labeller(
    dap = function(x) paste("DAP", x)
  )) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cultivar_colors) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(400, 1000)) +
  theme_gray() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 18, colour = "black", face = "bold"), 
  legend.position = c(0.925, 0.14), 
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10)),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(l = 10)),
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 15)),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 15)),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"))

p_combined_irrigation_grid_2025

# ggsave(plot = p_combined_irrigation_grid_2025,
#        filename = "../Output/Spectral/combined_irrigation_DAP_25.png",
#        dpi = 600,
#        width = 18,
#       height = 13
#        )

```

## Calculating vegetation indexes to correlation.

Chlorophyll pigments:
Chlorophyll indices - (https://doi.org/10.1078/0176-1617-00887) 
CIGreen - (RNIR/R520–585)-1
REGCI - (RNIR/R695–740)-1 
MCARI - [(R7002R670)20.2(R7002R550)·(R700/R670) (https://ntrs.nasa.gov/api/citations/19950010604/downloads/19950010604.pdf) *minimizing the effects of nonphotosynthetic materials on spectral estimates of absorbed photo synthetically active radiation.*


#4) Feature Selection and Correlation.

```{r Define response variables for 24}
phys_vars <- c("gs", "pn","etr","ca","cb","cx_c")

clean_ponder_na <- clean_ponder %>%
  drop_na()
  
X <- clean_ponder_na %>%
  select(starts_with("b_")) %>%
  as.matrix()

X <- scale(X)
```

```{r Run Elastic Net (α = 0.5) for each trait}
enet_results <- map_df(phys_vars, function(var) {
  
  y <- clean_ponder_na[[var]]
  
  cv_enet <- cv.glmnet(
    x = X,
    y = y,
    alpha = 0.9,          # Elastic Net
    standardize = TRUE,
    nfolds = 20
  )
  
  coef_mat <- coef(cv_enet, s = "lambda.min")
  
  tibble(
    band = rownames(coef_mat),
    coefficient = as.numeric(coef_mat),
    variable = var
  ) %>%
    filter(band != "(Intercept)") %>%
    mutate(
      abs_coef = abs(coefficient),
      band_num = as.numeric(str_remove(band, "b_"))
    )
})

# write_csv(enet_results,'../Output/enet_results.csv')

```


```{r Select important bands}
selected_bands <- enet_results %>%
  filter(abs_coef != 0)

```

```{r Converting Wavelength}
band_to_wavelength <- function(band_num,
                               wl_min = 400,
                               wl_max = 1000,
                               n_bands = 300) {
  wl_min + (band_num - 1) * (wl_max - wl_min) / (n_bands - 1)
}
```

```{r Selecting >0 important bands and assigning regions}
selected_bands_wl <- selected_bands %>%
  mutate(
    wavelength = round(band_to_wavelength(band_num),0)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    region = case_when(
      wavelength >= 400 & wavelength <  520 ~ "Blue",
      wavelength >= 520 & wavelength <  630 ~ "Green",
      wavelength >= 630 & wavelength <  680 ~ "Red",
      wavelength >= 680 & wavelength <  750 ~ "RedEdge",
      wavelength >= 750 & wavelength <= 1000 ~ "NIR"
      
    )
  ) 
```


```{r}
select_bcw <- selected_bands_wl %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = band,
              values_from = coefficient)
```


```{r Getting Bands from EN}

gs_bands <- selected_bands_wl %>%
  filter(variable == "gs") %>%
  pull(band_num)

gs_bands_chr <- paste0("b_", gs_bands)

pn_bands <- selected_bands_wl %>%
  filter(variable == "pn") %>%
  pull(band_num)

pn_bands_chr <- paste0("b_", pn_bands)

etr_bands <- selected_bands_wl %>%
  filter(variable == "etr") %>%
  pull(band_num)

etr_bands_chr <- paste0("b_", etr_bands)

ca_bands <- selected_bands_wl %>%
  filter(variable == "ca") %>%
  pull(band_num)

ca_bands_chr <- paste0("b_", ca_bands)

cb_bands <- selected_bands_wl %>%
  filter(variable == "cb") %>%
  pull(band_num)

cb_bands_chr <- paste0("b_", cb_bands)

cx_c_bands <- selected_bands_wl %>%
  filter(variable == "cx_c") %>%
  pull(band_num)
cx_c_bands_chr <- paste0("b_", cx_c_bands)

```

```{r Filtering Bands directly from ponder long}
ponder_gs <- ponder_long %>%
  filter(variable == "gs",
         band %in% gs_bands_chr)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable,
              values_from = value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = band,
              values_from = reflectance)

ponder_pn <- ponder_long %>%
  filter(variable == "pn",
         band %in% pn_bands_chr)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable,
              values_from = value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = band,
              values_from = reflectance)

ponder_etr <- ponder_long %>%
  filter(variable == "etr",
         band %in% etr_bands_chr)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable,
              values_from = value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = band,
              values_from = reflectance)

ponder_ca <- ponder_long %>%
  filter(variable == "ca",
         band %in% ca_bands_chr)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable,
              values_from = value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = band,
              values_from = reflectance)

ponder_cb <- ponder_long %>%
  filter(variable == "cb",
         band %in% cb_bands_chr)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable,
              values_from = value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = band,
              values_from = reflectance)

ponder_cx_c <- ponder_long %>%
  filter(variable == "cx_c",
         band %in% cx_c_bands_chr)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable,
              values_from = value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = band,
              values_from = reflectance)
```

blue    <- intersect(c("b_3","b_4","b_19","b_23"), gs_bands)
green   <- intersect(c("b_70","b_76"), gs_bands)
red     <- intersect(c("b_118","b_127"), gs_bands)
rededge <- intersect(c("b_162","b_164"), gs_bands)
nir     <- intersect(c("b_232","b_234","b_242","b_253","b_258","b_259","b_264",
                       "b_267","b_268","b_280","b_281","b_285"), gs_bands)

```{r Calculating Vegetation indices for gs}

ponder_gs <- ponder_gs %>%
  mutate(

    # NDVI variants
    ndvi_gs1 = (b_232 - b_113) / (b_232 + b_113),
    ndvi_gs2 = (b_285 - b_118) / (b_285 + b_118),

    # NDRE variants
    ndre_gs1 = (b_232 - b_162) / (b_232 + b_162),
    ndre_gs2 = (b_285 - b_164) / (b_285 + b_164),

    # CIgreen-like
    ci_green_gs1 = (b_232 / b_76) - 1,
    ci_green_gs2 = (b_285 / b_70) - 1,

    # CIred-edge-like
    ci_re_gs1 = (b_232 / b_162) - 1,
    ci_re_gs2 = (b_285 / b_164) - 1,

    # Simple ratios
    sr_gs1 = b_232 / b_113,
    sr_gs2 = b_285 / b_118,

    # NIR / RedEdge ratios
    srre_gs1 = b_232 / b_162,
    srre_gs2 = b_285 / b_164,

    # Blue–Green proxy
    nd_blue_green_gs1 = (b_76 - b_23) / (b_76 + b_23),
    nd_blue_green_gs2 = (b_70 - b_19) / (b_70 + b_19),

    # Red-edge slope proxy
    re_slope_gs1 = (b_164 - b_162) / (b_164 + b_162)

  )

```

```{r Heat gs indices}
index_cols_gs <- c(
  "ndvi_gs1", "ndvi_gs2",
  "ndre_gs1", "ndre_gs2",
  "ci_green_gs1", "ci_green_gs2",
  "ci_re_gs1", "ci_re_gs2",
  "sr_gs1", "sr_gs2",
  "srre_gs1", "srre_gs2",
  "nd_blue_green_gs1", "nd_blue_green_gs2",
  "re_slope_gs1"
)

spearman_idx_gs <- ponder_gs %>%
  summarise(across(
    all_of(index_cols_gs),
    ~cor(.x, gs, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = "index",
               values_to = "rho")

gs_heat <- ggplot(spearman_idx_gs, aes(x = index, y = "gs", fill = rho)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", rho)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", limits = c(-1,1), name = "Spearman ρ") +
  labs(x = "Vegetation indices", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r Calculating Veg indices for Chl a}

ponder_ca <- ponder_ca %>%
  mutate(

    # NDVI variants
    ndvi_ca1 = (b_253 - b_123) / (b_253 + b_123),
    ndvi_ca2 = (b_271 - b_123) / (b_271 + b_123),

    # NDRE variants
    ndre_ca1 = (b_253 - b_151) / (b_253 + b_151),
    ndre_ca2 = (b_271 - b_156) / (b_271 + b_156),
    ndre_ca3 = (b_280 - b_174) / (b_280 + b_174),

    # Simple ratio chlorophyll-like
    sr_ca1 = b_253 / b_123,
    sr_ca2 = b_271 / b_123,

    # CIred-edge-like
    ci_re_ca1 = (b_253 / b_151) - 1,
    ci_re_ca2 = (b_271 / b_156) - 1,

    # Red-edge slope proxies
    re_slope_ca1 = (b_174 - b_146) / (b_174 + b_146),
    re_slope_ca2 = (b_174 - b_151) / (b_174 + b_151),

    # NIR contrast proxies
    nir_contrast_ca1 = (b_300 - b_174) / (b_300 + b_174),
    nir_contrast_ca2 = (b_295 - b_156) / (b_295 + b_156)

  )

```

```{r Heat ca indices}
index_cols_ca <- c(
  "ndvi_ca1", "ndvi_ca2",
  "ndre_ca1", "ndre_ca2", "ndre_ca3",
  "sr_ca1", "sr_ca2",
  "ci_re_ca1", "ci_re_ca2",
  "re_slope_ca1", "re_slope_ca2",
  "nir_contrast_ca1", "nir_contrast_ca2"
)

spearman_idx <- ponder_ca %>%
  summarise(across(
    all_of(index_cols_ca),
    ~cor(.x, ca, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = "index",
               values_to = "rho")

ca_heat <- ggplot(spearman_idx, aes(x = index, y = "gs", fill = rho)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", rho)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", limits = c(-1,1), name = "Spearman ρ") +
  labs(x = "Vegetation indices", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank())

ggsave(filename = "../Output/heat_ca_spearm.png",
       plot = ca_heat,
       )

```

```{r Calculating Veg indices for pn}
ponder_pn <- ponder_pn %>%
  mutate(

    # NDVI variants
    ndvi_pn1 = (b_253 - b_136) / (b_253 + b_136),
    ndvi_pn2 = (b_281 - b_138) / (b_281 + b_138),

    # NDRE variants
    ndre_pn1 = (b_253 - b_164) / (b_253 + b_164),
    ndre_pn2 = (b_281 - b_162) / (b_281 + b_162),
    ndre_pn3 = (b_242 - b_172) / (b_242 + b_172),

    # CIgreen-like
    ci_green_pn1 = (b_253 / b_74) - 1,
    ci_green_pn2 = (b_242 / b_70) - 1,

    # CIred-edge-like
    ci_re_pn1 = (b_253 / b_164) - 1,
    ci_re_pn2 = (b_281 / b_162) - 1,

    # Simple ratios
    sr_nir_red_pn1 = b_253 / b_136,
    sr_nir_re_pn1  = b_253 / b_164,

    # Blue–Green proxies
    nd_blue_green_pn1 = (b_74 - b_22) / (b_74 + b_22),
    nd_blue_green_pn2 = (b_70 - b_16) / (b_70 + b_16),

    # Red-edge slope proxies
    re_slope_pn1 = (b_174 - b_149) / (b_174 + b_149),
    re_slope_pn2 = (b_173 - b_162) / (b_173 + b_162)

  )
```

```{r Heat spear pn}
index_cols_pn <- c(
  "ndvi_pn1", "ndvi_pn2",
  "ndre_pn1", "ndre_pn2", "ndre_pn3",
  "ci_green_pn1", "ci_green_pn2",
  "ci_re_pn1", "ci_re_pn2",
  "sr_nir_red_pn1", "sr_nir_re_pn1",
  "nd_blue_green_pn1", "nd_blue_green_pn2",
  "re_slope_pn1", "re_slope_pn2"
)

spearman_idx <- ponder_pn %>%
  summarise(across(
    all_of(index_cols_pn),
    ~cor(.x, pn, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = "index",
               values_to = "rho")

pn_heat <- ggplot(spearman_idx, aes(x = index, y = "gs", fill = rho)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", rho)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", limits = c(-1,1), name = "Spearman ρ") +
  labs(x = "Vegetation indices", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank())
```

```{r Calculating Veg indices for ETR}
ponder_etr <- ponder_etr %>%
   mutate(

    # NDVI variants
    ndvi_etr1 = (b_253 - b_113) / (b_253 + b_113),
    ndvi_etr2 = (b_281 - b_113) / (b_281 + b_113),
    ndvi_etr3 = (b_238 - b_113) / (b_238 + b_113),

    # NDRE variants
    ndre_etr1 = (b_253 - b_164) / (b_253 + b_164),
    ndre_etr2 = (b_238 - b_162) / (b_238 + b_162),
    ndre_etr3 = (b_281 - b_173) / (b_281 + b_173),

    # CIgreen-like
    ci_green_etr1 = (b_253 / b_74) - 1,
    ci_green_etr2 = (b_238 / b_74) - 1,

    # CIred-edge-like
    ci_re_etr1 = (b_253 / b_164) - 1,
    ci_re_etr2 = (b_281 / b_162) - 1,

    # Simple ratios
    sr_nir_red_etr1 = b_253 / b_113,
    sr_nir_re_etr1  = b_253 / b_164,

    # Blue–Green proxies
    nd_blue_green_etr1 = (b_74 - b_6) / (b_74 + b_6),
    nd_blue_green_etr2 = (b_74 - b_42) / (b_74 + b_42),

    # Red-edge slope proxies
    re_slope_etr1 = (b_174 - b_145) / (b_174 + b_145),
    re_slope_etr2 = (b_173 - b_162) / (b_173 + b_162)

  )
```

```{r Heat spear etr}
index_cols_etr <- c(
  "ndvi_etr1", "ndvi_etr2", "ndvi_etr3",
  "ndre_etr1", "ndre_etr2", "ndre_etr3",
  "ci_green_etr1", "ci_green_etr2",
  "ci_re_etr1", "ci_re_etr2",
  "sr_nir_red_etr1", "sr_nir_re_etr1",
  "nd_blue_green_etr1", "nd_blue_green_etr2",
  "re_slope_etr1", "re_slope_etr2"
)

spearman_idx <- ponder_etr %>%
  summarise(across(
    all_of(index_cols_etr),
    ~cor(.x, etr, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = "index",
               values_to = "rho")

etr_heat <- ggplot(spearman_idx, aes(x = index, y = "gs", fill = rho)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", rho)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", limits = c(-1,1), name = "Spearman ρ") +
  labs(x = "Vegetation indices", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank())

```


```{r Calculating Veg indices for Chl B}
ponder_cb <- ponder_cb %>%
  mutate(

    # NDVI variants
    ndvi_cb1 = (b_252 - b_123) / (b_252 + b_123),
    ndvi_cb2 = (b_271 - b_123) / (b_271 + b_123),

    # NDRE variants
    ndre_cb1 = (b_252 - b_155) / (b_252 + b_155),
    ndre_cb2 = (b_271 - b_157) / (b_271 + b_157),
    ndre_cb3 = (b_280 - b_161) / (b_280 + b_161),
    ndre_cb4 = (b_161 - b_155) / (b_161 + b_155),
    ndre_cb5 = (b_159 - b_155) / (b_159 + b_155),
    # CIgreen-like
    ci_green_cb1 = (b_252 / b_71) - 1,
    ci_green_cb2 = (b_271 / b_71) - 1,

    # CIred-edge-like
    ci_re_cb1 = (b_252 / b_155) - 1,
    ci_re_cb2 = (b_271 / b_155) - 1,

    # Simple ratios
    sr_nir_red_cb1 = b_252 / b_123,
    sr_nir_re_cb1  = b_252 / b_155,

    # Blue/Red proxies
    br_cb1 = b_34 / b_123,
    br_cb2 = b_54 / b_123,

    # Blue/Green proxies
    b_g_NDVIcb1 = (b_71 - b_17) / (b_71 + b_17),
    b_g_NDVIcb2 = (b_71 - b_54) / (b_71 + b_54)

    # Red-edge slope proxies
    

  )


index_labels_cb <- c(
  ndvi_cb1 = "NDVI (NIR₁–Red₁)",
  ndvi_cb2 = "NDVI (NIR₂–Red₂)",
  
  ndre_cb1 = "NDRE (NIR₁–RE₁)",
  ndre_cb2 = "NDRE (NIR₂–RE₂)",
  ndre_cb3 = "NDRE (NIR₃–RE₃)",
  ndre_cb4 = "NDRE (Alt 1)",
  ndre_cb5 = "NDRE (Alt 2)",
  
  ci_green_cb1 = "CIgreen (NIR₁/Green)",
  ci_green_cb2 = "CIgreen (NIR₂/Green)",
  
  ci_re_cb1 = "CIred-edge (NIR₁/RE)",
  ci_re_cb2 = "CIred-edge (NIR₂/RE)",
  
  sr_nir_red_cb1 = "SR (NIR/Red)",
  sr_nir_re_cb1 = "SR (NIR/RE)",
  
  br_cb1 = "Blue/Red ratio 1",
  br_cb2 = "Blue/Red ratio 2",
  
  b_g_NDVIcb1 = "NDVI (Green–Blue) 1",
  b_g_NDVIcb2 = "NDVI (Green–Blue) 2"
)
```

```{r Heat spear Chl B}
index_cols_cb <- c(
  "ndvi_cb1", "ndvi_cb2",
  "ndre_cb1", "ndre_cb2", "ndre_cb3",
  "ci_green_cb1", "ci_green_cb2",
  "ci_re_cb1", "ci_re_cb2",
  "sr_nir_red_cb1", "sr_nir_re_cb1",
  "br_cb1", "br_cb2",
  "b_g_NDVIcb1", "b_g_NDVIcb2",
  "ndre_cb4", "ndre_cb5"
)

spearman_idx_cb <- ponder_cb %>%
  summarise(across(
    all_of(index_cols_cb),
    ~cor(.x, cb, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = "index",
               values_to = "rho")

cb_heat <- ggplot(spearman_idx_cb, aes(x = index, y = "gs", fill = rho)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", rho)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", limits = c(-1,1), name = "Spearman ρ") +
  labs(x = "Vegetation indices", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank())

```


```{r Veg Indices for Cx_C}
ponder_cx_c <- ponder_cx_c %>%
  mutate(

    # NDVI variants
    ndvi_cx1 = (b_271 - b_123) / (b_271 + b_123),
    ndvi_cx2 = (b_281 - b_139) / (b_281 + b_139),

    # NDRE variants
    ndre_cx1 = (b_271 - b_151) / (b_271 + b_151),
    ndre_cx2 = (b_281 - b_156) / (b_281 + b_156),
    ndre_cx3 = (b_253 - b_151) / (b_253 + b_151),

    # CIgreen-like
    ci_green_cx1 = (b_271 / b_92) - 1,
    ci_green_cx2 = (b_281 / b_92) - 1,

    # CIred-edge-like
    ci_re_cx1 = (b_271 / b_151) - 1,
    ci_re_cx2 = (b_281 / b_156) - 1,

    # Blue/Green proxies
    nd_blue_green_cx1 = (b_92 - b_18) / (b_92 + b_18),
    nd_blue_green_cx2 = (b_92 - b_42) / (b_92 + b_42),

    # Blue/Red proxies
    br_cx1 = b_48 / b_123,
    br_cx2 = b_49 / b_139,

    # Red-edge slope proxies
    re_slope_cx1 = (b_174 - b_146) / (b_174 + b_146),
    re_slope_cx2 = (b_173 - b_151) / (b_173 + b_151)

  )
```

```{r Heatmap Cx_C}
index_cols_cx_c <- c(
  "ndvi_cx1", "ndvi_cx2",
  "ndre_cx1", "ndre_cx2", "ndre_cx3",
  "ci_green_cx1", "ci_green_cx2",
  "ci_re_cx1", "ci_re_cx2",
  "nd_blue_green_cx1", "nd_blue_green_cx2",
  "br_cx1", "br_cx2",
  "re_slope_cx1", "re_slope_cx2"
)

spearman_idx_cxc <- ponder_cx_c %>%
  summarise(across(
    all_of(index_cols_cx_c),
    ~cor(.x, cx_c, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = "index",
               values_to = "rho")

cb_heat <- ggplot(spearman_idx_cxc, aes(x = index, y = "gs", fill = rho)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", rho)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", limits = c(-1,1), name = "Spearman ρ") +
  labs(x = "Vegetation indices", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank())

```

```{r}
ggplot(data = selected_bands_wl,
       aes(x = wavelength,
           y = coefficient
           )) +
  geom_col(width = 2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 450, color= "blue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 550, color = "green") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 660, color = "red") +
  geom_line(aes(group = 1)) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(title = element_text("Importance Distribution Across Spectrum"),
       x = element_text("Wavelength (nm)"),
       y = element_text("Coefficient Value"))
  

  
```

#5) Regressions

```{r Setting up Dataframe to Use Only Desired Bands Selected by Elastic Net.}
long_ponder <- clean_ponder %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = contains("b_"),
               values_to = "reflect",
               names_to = "band")%>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("ca":"etr"), 
               names_to = "variable")

write_csv(long_ponder, file = "../Output/bands.csv")

regression <- long_ponder %>% 
  inner_join(selected_bands_wl, 
            by = c("band", "variable"))

write_csv(regression, file = "../Output/bands_filt.csv")

unique(regression$dap)

```
```{r}
# ----------------------------
# CA
# ----------------------------
ca74i <- ponder_ca %>% filter(dap == 74)  %>% select(ca,   all_of(index_cols_ca))   %>% rename(ca74i = ca)
ca81i <- ponder_ca %>% filter(dap == 81)  %>% select(ca,   all_of(index_cols_ca))   %>% rename(ca81i = ca)
ca82i <- ponder_ca %>% filter(dap == 82)  %>% select(ca,   all_of(index_cols_ca))   %>% rename(ca82i = ca)
ca89i <- ponder_ca %>% filter(dap == 89)  %>% select(ca,   all_of(index_cols_ca))   %>% rename(ca89i = ca)
ca109i <- ponder_ca %>% filter(dap == 109) %>% select(ca,  all_of(index_cols_ca))   %>% rename(ca109i = ca)
ca112i <- ponder_ca %>% filter(dap == 112) %>% select(ca,  all_of(index_cols_ca))   %>% rename(ca112i = ca)

# ----------------------------
# CB
# ----------------------------
cb74i <- ponder_cb %>% filter(dap == 74)  %>% select(cb,   all_of(index_cols_cb))   %>% rename(cb74i = cb)
cb81i <- ponder_cb %>% filter(dap == 81)  %>% select(cb,   all_of(index_cols_cb))   %>% rename(cb81i = cb)
cb82i <- ponder_cb %>% filter(dap == 82)  %>% select(cb,   all_of(index_cols_cb))   %>% rename(cb82i = cb)
cb89i <- ponder_cb %>% filter(dap == 89)  %>% select(cb,   all_of(index_cols_cb))   %>% rename(cb89i = cb)
cb109i <- ponder_cb %>% filter(dap == 109) %>% select(cb,  all_of(index_cols_cb))   %>% rename(cb109i = cb)
cb112i <- ponder_cb %>% filter(dap == 112) %>% select(cb,  all_of(index_cols_cb))   %>% rename(cb112i = cb)

# ----------------------------
# CX_C
# ----------------------------
cxc74i <- ponder_cx_c %>% filter(dap == 74)  %>% select(cx_c, all_of(index_cols_cx_c)) %>% rename(cxc74i = cx_c)
cxc75i <- ponder_cx_c %>% filter(dap == 75)  %>% select(cx_c, all_of(index_cols_cx_c)) %>% rename(cxc75i = cx_c)
cxc81i <- ponder_cx_c %>% filter(dap == 81)  %>% select(cx_c, all_of(index_cols_cx_c)) %>% rename(cxc81i = cx_c)
cxc82i <- ponder_cx_c %>% filter(dap == 82)  %>% select(cx_c, all_of(index_cols_cx_c)) %>% rename(cxc82i = cx_c)
cxc89i <- ponder_cx_c %>% filter(dap == 89)  %>% select(cx_c, all_of(index_cols_cx_c)) %>% rename(cxc89i = cx_c)
cxc109i <- ponder_cx_c %>% filter(dap == 109) %>% select(cx_c, all_of(index_cols_cx_c)) %>% rename(cxc109i = cx_c)
cxc112i <- ponder_cx_c %>% filter(dap == 112) %>% select(cx_c, all_of(index_cols_cx_c)) %>% rename(cxc112i = cx_c)

# ----------------------------
# ETR
# ----------------------------
etr74i <- ponder_etr %>% filter(dap == 74)  %>% select(etr,  all_of(index_cols_etr)) %>% rename(etr74i = etr)
etr75i <- ponder_etr %>% filter(dap == 75)  %>% select(etr,  all_of(index_cols_etr)) %>% rename(etr75i = etr)
etr81i <- ponder_etr %>% filter(dap == 81)  %>% select(etr,  all_of(index_cols_etr)) %>% rename(etr81i = etr)
etr82i <- ponder_etr %>% filter(dap == 82)  %>% select(etr,  all_of(index_cols_etr)) %>% rename(etr82i = etr)
etr89i <- ponder_etr %>% filter(dap == 89)  %>% select(etr,  all_of(index_cols_etr)) %>% rename(etr89i = etr)
etr109i <- ponder_etr %>% filter(dap == 109) %>% select(etr, all_of(index_cols_etr)) %>% rename(etr109i = etr)
etr112i <- ponder_etr %>% filter(dap == 112) %>% select(etr, all_of(index_cols_etr)) %>% rename(etr112i = etr)

# ----------------------------
# GS
# ----------------------------
gs74i <- ponder_gs %>% filter(dap == 74)  %>% select(gs,   all_of(index_cols_gs))   %>% rename(gs74i = gs)
gs75i <- ponder_gs %>% filter(dap == 75)  %>% select(gs,   all_of(index_cols_gs))   %>% rename(gs75i = gs)
gs81i <- ponder_gs %>% filter(dap == 81)  %>% select(gs,   all_of(index_cols_gs))   %>% rename(gs81i = gs)
gs82i <- ponder_gs %>% filter(dap == 82)  %>% select(gs,   all_of(index_cols_gs))   %>% rename(gs82i = gs)
gs89i <- ponder_gs %>% filter(dap == 89)  %>% select(gs,   all_of(index_cols_gs))   %>% rename(gs89i = gs)
gs109i <- ponder_gs %>% filter(dap == 109) %>% select(gs,  all_of(index_cols_gs))   %>% rename(gs109i = gs)
gs112i <- ponder_gs %>% filter(dap == 112) %>% select(gs,  all_of(index_cols_gs))   %>% rename(gs112i = gs)

# ----------------------------
# PN
# ----------------------------
pn74i <- ponder_pn %>% filter(dap == 74)  %>% select(pn,   all_of(index_cols_pn))   %>% rename(pn74i = pn)
pn75i <- ponder_pn %>% filter(dap == 75)  %>% select(pn,   all_of(index_cols_pn))   %>% rename(pn75i = pn)
pn81i <- ponder_pn %>% filter(dap == 81)  %>% select(pn,   all_of(index_cols_pn))   %>% rename(pn81i = pn)
pn82i <- ponder_pn %>% filter(dap == 82)  %>% select(pn,   all_of(index_cols_pn))   %>% rename(pn82i = pn)
pn89i <- ponder_pn %>% filter(dap == 89)  %>% select(pn,   all_of(index_cols_pn))   %>% rename(pn89i = pn)
pn109i <- ponder_pn %>% filter(dap == 109) %>% select(pn,  all_of(index_cols_pn))   %>% rename(pn109i = pn)
pn112i <- ponder_pn %>% filter(dap == 112) %>% select(pn,  all_of(index_cols_pn))   %>% rename(pn112i = pn)
```

```{r Subset of Variables 74 DAP}

ca74 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "ca" & dap == 74) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(ca74 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

ca82i <- ponder_ca %>%
  filter(dap == 82) %>%
  select(8, 28:40) %>%
  rename(ca82i = ca)

ca89i <- ponder_ca %>%
  filter(dap == 89)%>%
  select(8, 28:40) %>%
  rename(ca89i = ca)

ca112i <- ponder_ca %>%
  filter(dap == 112) %>%
  select(8, 28:40) %>%
  rename(ca112i = ca)

ca74i <- ponder_ca %>%
  filter(dap == 74)%>%
  select(8, 28:40) %>%
  rename(ca74i = ca)

ca81i <- ponder_ca %>%
  filter(dap == 81) %>%
  select(8, 28:40) %>%
  rename(ca81i = ca)

ca109i <- ponder_ca %>%
  filter(dap == 109) %>%
  select(8, 28:40) %>%
  rename(ca109i = ca)

cb82i <- ponder_cb %>%
  filter(dap == 82) %>%
  select(8,40:50) %>%
  rename(cb82i = cb)

cb89i <- ponder_cb %>%
  filter(dap == 89) %>%
  select(8,40:50) %>%
  rename(cb89i = cb)

cb112i <- ponder_cb %>%
  filter(dap == 112) %>%
  select(8,40:50) %>%
  rename(cb112i = cb)

cb74i <- ponder_cb %>%
  filter(dap == 74) %>%
  select(8,40:50) %>%
  rename(cb74i = cb)

cb81i <- ponder_cb %>%
  filter(dap == 81) %>%
  select(8,40:50) %>%
  rename(cb81i = cb)

cb109i <- ponder_cb %>%
  filter(dap == 109) %>%
  select(8,40:50) %>%
  rename(cb109i = cb)

cxc75i <- ponder_cx_c %>%
  filter(dap == 75) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(cxc75i = cx_c)

cxc82i <- ponder_cx_c %>%
  filter(dap == 82) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(cxc82i = cx_c)

cxc89i <- ponder_cx_c %>%
  filter(dap == 89) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(cxc89i = cx_c)

cxc112i <- ponder_cx_c %>%
  filter(dap == 112) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(cxc112i = cx_c)

cxc74i <- ponder_cx_c %>%
  filter(dap == 74) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(cxc74i = cx_c)

cxc81i <- ponder_cx_c %>%
  filter(dap == 81) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(cxc81i = cx_c)

cxc109i <- ponder_cx_c %>%
  filter(dap == 109) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(cxc109i = cx_c)

etr75i <- ponder_etr %>%
  filter(dap == 75) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(etr75i = etr)

etr82i <- ponder_etr %>%
  filter(dap == 82) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(etr82i = etr)

etr89i <- ponder_etr %>%
  filter(dap == 89) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(etr89i = etr)

etr112i <- ponder_etr %>%
  filter(dap == 112) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(etr112i = etr)

etr74i <- ponder_etr %>%
  filter(dap == 74) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(etr74i = etr)

etr81i <- ponder_etr %>%
  filter(dap == 81) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(etr81i = etr)

etr109i <- ponder_etr %>%
  filter(dap == 109) %>%
  select(8, 40:50) %>%
  rename(etr109i = etr)

gs75i <- ponder_gs %>%
  filter(dap == 75) %>%
  select(8, 31:45)%>%
  rename(gs75i = gs)

gs82i <- ponder_gs %>%
  filter(dap == 82) %>%
  select(8, 31:45)%>%
  rename(gs82i = gs)

gs89i <- ponder_gs %>%
  filter(dap == 89) %>%
  select(8, 31:45)%>%
  rename(gs89i = gs)

gs112i <- ponder_gs %>%
  filter(dap == 112) %>%
  select(8, 31:45)%>%
  rename(gs112i = gs)

gs74i <- ponder_gs %>%
  filter(dap == 74) %>%
  select(8, 31:45)%>%
  rename(gs74i = gs)

gs81i <- ponder_gs %>%
  filter(dap == 81) %>%
  select(8, 31:45)%>%
  rename(gs81i = gs)

gs109i <- ponder_gs %>%
  filter(dap == 109) %>%
  select(8, 31:45)%>%
  rename(gs109i = gs)

pn75i <- ponder_pn %>%
  filter(dap == 75) %>%
  select(8,50) %>%
  rename(pn75i = pn)

pn82i <- ponder_pn %>%
  filter(dap == 82) %>%
  select(8,50) %>%
  rename(pn82i = pn)

pn89i <- ponder_pn %>%
  filter(dap == 89) %>%
  select(8,50) %>%
  rename(pn89i = pn)

pn112i <- ponder_pn %>%
  filter(dap == 112) %>%
  select(8,50) %>%
  rename(pn112i = pn)

pn74i <- ponder_pn %>%
  filter(dap == 74) %>%
  select(8,50) %>%
  rename(pn74i = pn)

pn81i <- ponder_pn %>%
  filter(dap == 81) %>%
  select(8,50) %>%
  rename(pn81i = pn)

pn109i <- ponder_pn %>%
  filter(dap == 109) %>%
  select(8,50) %>%
  rename(pn109i = pn)







ca75 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "ca" & dap == 75) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(ca75 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)



cx_c74 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "cx_c" & dap == 74) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cx_c74 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

cx_c75 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "cx_c" & dap == 75) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cx_c75 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

cb74 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "cb" & dap == 74) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cb74 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

cb75 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "cb" & dap == 75) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cb75 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

etr74 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "etr" & dap == 74) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(etr74 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

etr75 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "etr" & dap == 75) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(etr75 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

gs74 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "gs" & dap == 74) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(gs74 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

gs75 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "gs" & dap == 75) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(gs75 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

net_photo74 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "pn" & dap == 74) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(net_photo74 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

net_photo75 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "pn" & dap == 74) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(net_photo75 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

```

```{r Subset of Variables 81 DAP}


ca81 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "ca" & dap == 81) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(ca81 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

ca82 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "ca" & dap == 82) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(ca82 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

  filter(variable == "cx_c" & dap == 82) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
```
