```{r Subset of Variables 81 DAP}
  filter(variable == "cx_c" & dap == 81) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cx_c81 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

cb81 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "cb" & dap == 81) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cb81 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

cb82 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "cb" & dap == 82) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cb82 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

etr81 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "etr" & dap == 81) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(etr81 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

etr82 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "etr" & dap == 82) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(etr82 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

gs81 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "gs" & dap == 81) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(gs81 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

gs82 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "gs" & dap == 82) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(gs82 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

net_photo81 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "pn" & dap == 81) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(net_photo81 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

net_photo82 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "pn" & dap == 82) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(net_photo82 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

```

```{r Subset of Variables 109 DAP}


ca109 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "ca" & dap == 109) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(ca109 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

ca112 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "ca" & dap == 112) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(ca112 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

ca89  <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "ca" & dap == 89 ) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(ca89  = value) %>%
  select(-variable)


cx_c109 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "cx_c" & dap == 109) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cx_c109 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

cx_c112 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "cx_c" & dap == 112) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cx_c112 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

cx_c89  <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "cx_c" & dap == 89 ) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cx_c89  = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

cb109 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "cb" & dap == 109) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cb109 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

cb112 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "cb" & dap == 112) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cb112 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

cb89  <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "cb" & dap == 89 ) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(cb89  = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

etr109 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "etr" & dap == 109) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(etr109 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

etr112 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "etr" & dap == 112) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(etr112 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

etr89  <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "etr" & dap == 89 ) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(etr89  = value) %>%
  select(-variable)


gs109 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "gs" & dap == 109) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(gs109 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

gs112 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "gs" & dap == 112) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(gs112 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

gs89  <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "gs" & dap == 89 ) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(gs89  = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

net_photo109 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "pn" & dap == 109) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(net_photo109 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

net_photo112 <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "pn" & dap == 112) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(net_photo112 = value) %>%
  select(-variable)

net_photo89  <- regression %>%
  filter(variable == "pn" & dap == 89 ) %>%
  select(band:value, reflect) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = band,
    values_from = reflect,
    values_fn = mean   # or median
  ) %>%
  rename(net_photo89  = value) %>%
  select(-variable)
```

```{r Setting up Models, Hyperparameters, and Evaluation Metrics}

# Evaluation function

evaluate_model <- function(model, dataset, target_name, dataset_name) {
  predicoes <- predict(model, dataset)
  obs <- dataset[[target_name]]
  data.frame(
    Dataset = dataset_name,
    MAE = mean(abs(predicoes - obs)),
    MSE = mean((predicoes - obs)^2),
    RMSE = sqrt(mean((predicoes - obs)^2)),
    R2 = cor(predicoes, obs)^2
  )
}

# Dataset names

datasets <- list(
  ca74 = ca74, ca81 = ca81, ca82 = ca82, ca89 = ca89, ca109 = ca109, ca112 = ca112,
  cb74 = cb74, cb81 = cb81, cb82 = cb82, cb89 = cb89, cb109 = cb109, cb112 = cb112,
  cx_c74 = cx_c74, cx_c81 = cx_c81, cx_c82 = cx_c82, cx_c89 = cx_c89, cx_c109 = cx_c109, cx_c112 = cx_c112,
  etr74 = etr74, etr75 = etr75, etr81 = etr81, etr82 = etr82, etr89 = etr89, etr109 = etr109, etr112 = etr112,
  gs74 = gs74, gs75 = gs75, gs81 = gs81, gs82 = gs82, gs89 = gs89, gs109 = gs109, gs112 = gs112,
  net_photo74 = net_photo74, net_photo75 = net_photo75, net_photo81 = net_photo81,
  net_photo82 = net_photo82, net_photo89 = net_photo89, net_photo109 = net_photo109, net_photo112 = net_photo112
)


datasets_index <- list(
  ca74i = ca74i, ca81i = ca81i, ca82i = ca82i, ca89i = ca89i, ca109i = ca109i, ca112i = ca112i,
  cb74i = cb74i, cb81i = cb81i, cb82i = cb82i, cb89i = cb89i, cb109i = cb109i, cb112i = cb112i,
  cxc74i = cxc74i, cxc75i = cxc75i, cxc81i = cxc81i, cxc82i = cxc82i, cxc89i = cxc89i, cxc109i = cxc109i, cxc112i = cxc112i,
  etr74i = etr74i, etr75i = etr75i, etr81i = etr81i, etr82i = etr82i, etr89i = etr89i, etr109i = etr109i, etr112i = etr112i,
  gs74i = gs74i, gs75i = gs75i, gs81i = gs81i, gs82i = gs82i, gs89i = gs89i, gs109i = gs109i, gs112i = gs112i,
  pn74i = pn74i, pn75i = pn75i, pn81i = pn81i, pn82i = pn82i, pn89i = pn89i, pn109i = pn109i, pn112i = pn112i
)

# Controle de treinamento
ctrl <- trainControl(method = "repeatedcv", number = 5, repeats = 5, search = "grid")

# Grades de hiperparâmetros
tune_grid_rf <- expand.grid(mtry = c(2, 3, 4, 5), splitrule = c("variance", "extratrees"), min.node.size = c(1, 5, 10))
tune_grid_svm <- expand.grid(C = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100), sigma = c(0.001, 0.01, 0.1, 1))
tune_grid_knn <- expand.grid(kmax = c(3, 5, 7, 9, 11), distance = c(1, 2), kernel = c("rectangular", "triangular", "epanechnikov"))
tune_grid_xgbTree <- expand.grid(nrounds = c(500, 1000, 1500), max_depth = c(2, 4, 6), eta = c(0.01, 0.1, 0.3),
                                 gamma = c(0, 0.1, 0.2), colsample_bytree = c(0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1), min_child_weight = c(1, 3, 5), subsample = 1)
```

```{r}
names(ca74i)
names(cb74i)
names(cxc74i)
names(etr74i)
names(gs74i)
names(pn74i)
```





```{r Random Forest Regression Model}
resultados_rf <- data.frame()

for (nome_dataset in names(datasets)) {
  
  df <- datasets[[nome_dataset]] %>%
    na.omit() %>%
    mutate(across(starts_with("b_"), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(.))))) %>%
    select(where(~ !(all(is.na(.)) & is.numeric(.))))   # DROP BAD COLUMNS
  
  target <- names(df)[1]
  
  set.seed(123)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining,]
  teste <- df[-inTraining,]
  
  model_rf <- train(
    formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "ranger",
    trControl = ctrl,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_rf,
    importance = "impurity"
  )
  
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_rf, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste  <- evaluate_model(model_rf, teste,  target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  
  resultados_rf <- bind_rows(resultados_rf, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}

print(resultados_rf)


```

```{r Evaluate to rep}
evaluate_model <- function(model, dataset, target_name, dataset_name) {
  predicoes <- predict(model, dataset)
  obs <- dataset[[target_name]]
  
  data.frame(
    Dataset = dataset_name,
    MAE = mean(abs(predicoes - obs)),
    MSE = mean((predicoes - obs)^2),
    RMSE = sqrt(mean((predicoes - obs)^2)),
    R2 = cor(predicoes, obs)^2
  )
}
```

```{r Function to Rep}
make_ctrl <- function(tune_grid, seed = 42, number = 5, repeats = 5) {
  n_resamples <- number * repeats
  n_models <- nrow(tune_grid)
  
  set.seed(seed)
  seeds <- vector(mode = "list", length = n_resamples + 1)
  
  for (i in seq_len(n_resamples)) {
    seeds[[i]] <- sample.int(100000, n_models)
  }
  
  seeds[[n_resamples + 1]] <- sample.int(100000, 1)
  
  trainControl(
    method = "repeatedcv",
    number = number,
    repeats = repeats,
    search = "grid",
    seeds = seeds
  )
}
```

```{r RF Indices Rep}
resultados_rf_i <- data.frame()

for (nome_dataset in names(datasets_index)) {
  
  df <- datasets_index[[nome_dataset]] %>%
    na.omit()
  
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) < 5 || ncol(df) < 2) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": too few rows or columns")
    next
  }
  
  target <- names(df)[1]
  
  if (is.na(target) || !(target %in% names(df))) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": invalid target")
    next
  }
  
  n_pred <- ncol(df) - 1
  
  if (n_pred < 1) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": no predictors")
    next
  }
  
  tune_grid_rf <- expand.grid(
    mtry = unique(pmin(c(2, 3, 4, 5), n_pred)),
    splitrule = c("variance", "extratrees"),
    min.node.size = c(1, 5, 10)
  )
  
  ctrl_rf <- make_ctrl(tune_grid_rf, seed = 42, number = 5, repeats = 5)
  
  set.seed(42)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining, , drop = FALSE]
  teste  <- df[-inTraining, , drop = FALSE]
  
  if (nrow(teste) < 1) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": no test rows")
    next
  }
  
  set.seed(42)
  model_rf <- train(
    as.formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "ranger",
    trControl = ctrl_rf,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_rf,
    importance = "impurity"
  )
  
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_rf, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste  <- evaluate_model(model_rf, teste,  target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  
  resultados_rf_i <- bind_rows(resultados_rf_i, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}

print(resultados_rf_i)
```

```{r SVM Rep}
resultados_svm_i <- data.frame()

for (nome_dataset in names(datasets_index)) {
  
  df <- datasets_index[[nome_dataset]] %>%
    na.omit()
  
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) < 5 || ncol(df) < 2) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": too few rows or columns")
    next
  }
  
  target <- names(df)[1]
  
  if (is.na(target) || !(target %in% names(df))) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": invalid target")
    next
  }
  
  n_pred <- ncol(df) - 1
  
  if (n_pred < 1) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": no predictors")
    next
  }
  
  set.seed(42)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining, , drop = FALSE]
  teste  <- df[-inTraining, , drop = FALSE]
  
  if (nrow(teste) < 1) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": no test rows")
    next
  }
  
  # remove near-zero variance predictors
  nzv <- nearZeroVar(treino, saveMetrics = TRUE)
  cols_keep <- rownames(nzv)[!nzv$nzv]
  cols_keep <- union(target, cols_keep)
  
  treino <- treino[, cols_keep, drop = FALSE]
  teste  <- teste[, cols_keep, drop = FALSE]
  
  if (ncol(treino) < 2) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": predictors removed after nearZeroVar")
    next
  }
  
  tune_grid_svm <- expand.grid(
    C = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100),
    sigma = c(0.001, 0.01, 0.1, 1)
  )
  
  ctrl_svm <- make_ctrl(tune_grid_svm, seed = 42, number = 5, repeats = 5)
  
  set.seed(42)
  model_svm <- train(
    as.formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "svmRadial",
    preProcess = c("center", "scale"),
    trControl = ctrl_svm,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_svm
  )
  
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_svm, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste  <- evaluate_model(model_svm, teste,  target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  
  resultados_svm_i <- bind_rows(resultados_svm_i, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}

print(resultados_svm_i)
```

```{r KNN Rep}

resultados_knn_i <- data.frame()

for (nome_dataset in names(datasets_index)) {
  
  df <- datasets_index[[nome_dataset]] %>%
    na.omit()
  
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) < 5 || ncol(df) < 2) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": too few rows or columns")
    next
  }
  
  target <- names(df)[1]
  
  if (is.na(target) || !(target %in% names(df))) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": invalid target")
    next
  }
  
  n_pred <- ncol(df) - 1
  
  if (n_pred < 1) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": no predictors")
    next
  }
  
  set.seed(42)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining, , drop = FALSE]
  teste  <- df[-inTraining, , drop = FALSE]
  
  if (nrow(teste) < 1) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": no test rows")
    next
  }
  
  # remove near-zero variance predictors
  nzv <- nearZeroVar(treino, saveMetrics = TRUE)
  cols_keep <- rownames(nzv)[!nzv$nzv]
  cols_keep <- union(target, cols_keep)
  
  treino <- treino[, cols_keep, drop = FALSE]
  teste  <- teste[, cols_keep, drop = FALSE]
  
  if (ncol(treino) < 2) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": predictors removed after nearZeroVar")
    next
  }
  
  # adapt k to dataset size
  max_k_allowed <- max(1, min(11, nrow(treino) - 1))
  k_vals <- c(3, 5, 7, 9, 11)
  k_vals <- k_vals[k_vals <= max_k_allowed]
  
  if (length(k_vals) == 0) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": not enough training rows for KNN")
    next
  }
  
  tune_grid_knn <- expand.grid(
    kmax = unique(k_vals),
    distance = c(1, 2),
    kernel = c("rectangular", "triangular", "epanechnikov")
  )
  
  ctrl_knn <- make_ctrl(tune_grid_knn, seed = 42, number = 5, repeats = 5)
  
  set.seed(42)
  model_knn <- train(
    as.formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "kknn",
    preProcess = c("center", "scale"),
    trControl = ctrl_knn,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_knn
  )
  
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_knn, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste  <- evaluate_model(model_knn, teste,  target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  
  resultados_knn_i <- bind_rows(resultados_knn_i, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}

print(resultados_knn_i)
```

```{r Random Forest Indices}
resultados_rf_i <- data.frame()

for (nome_dataset in names(datasets_index)) {
  
  df <- datasets_index[[nome_dataset]] %>%
    na.omit()
  
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) < 5 || ncol(df) < 2) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": too few rows or columns")
    next
  }
  
  target <- names(df)[1]
  
  if (is.na(target) || !(target %in% names(df))) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": invalid target")
    next
  }
  
  n_pred <- ncol(df) - 1
  
  if (n_pred < 1) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": no predictors")
    next
  }
  
  tune_grid_rf <- expand.grid(
    mtry = unique(pmin(c(2, 3, 4, 5), n_pred)),
    splitrule = c("variance", "extratrees"),
    min.node.size = c(1, 5, 10)
  )
  
  set.seed(42)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining, ]
  teste  <- df[-inTraining, ]
  
  if (nrow(teste) < 1) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": no test rows")
    next
  }
  
  model_rf <- train(
    as.formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "ranger",
    trControl = ctrl,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_rf,
    importance = "impurity"
  )
  
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_rf, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste  <- evaluate_model(model_rf, teste, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  
  resultados_rf_i <- bind_rows(resultados_rf_i, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}

print(resultados_rf_i)

```



```{r Support Vector Machine Regression Model}

resultados_svm <- data.frame()
for (nome_dataset in names(datasets)) {
  df <- datasets[[nome_dataset]] %>% na.omit()
  target <- names(df)[1]
  set.seed(42)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining,]
  teste <- df[-inTraining,]
  model_svm <- train(
    formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "svmRadial",
    preProcess = c("center", "scale"),
    trControl = ctrl,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_svm
  )
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_svm, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste <- evaluate_model(model_svm, teste, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  resultados_svm <- bind_rows(resultados_svm, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}
print(resultados_svm)
```

```{r SVM Indices}
resultados_svm_i <- data.frame()

for (nome_dataset in names(datasets_index)) {
  
  df <- datasets_index[[nome_dataset]] %>%
    na.omit()
  
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) < 5 || ncol(df) < 2) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": too few rows or columns")
    next
  }
  
  target <- names(df)[1]
  
  if (is.na(target) || !(target %in% names(df))) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": invalid target")
    next
  }
  
  n_pred <- ncol(df) - 1
  
  if (n_pred < 1) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": no predictors")
    next
  }
  
  set.seed(42)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining, ]
  teste  <- df[-inTraining, ]
  
  if (nrow(teste) < 1) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": no test rows")
    next
  }
  
  # optional: remove predictors with zero variance in training
  nzv <- nearZeroVar(treino, saveMetrics = TRUE)
  cols_keep <- rownames(nzv)[!nzv$nzv]
  cols_keep <- union(target, cols_keep)
  
  treino <- treino[, cols_keep, drop = FALSE]
  teste  <- teste[, cols_keep, drop = FALSE]
  
  if (ncol(treino) < 2) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": predictors removed after nearZeroVar")
    next
  }
  
  model_svm <- train(
    as.formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "svmRadial",
    preProcess = c("center", "scale"),
    trControl = ctrl,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_svm
  )
  
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_svm, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste  <- evaluate_model(model_svm, teste,  target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  
  resultados_svm_i <- bind_rows(resultados_svm_i, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}

print(resultados_svm_i)
```



```{r K Nearest Neighbor Regression Model}

resultados_knn <- data.frame()
for (nome_dataset in names(datasets)) {
  df <- datasets[[nome_dataset]] %>% na.omit()
  target <- names(df)[1]
  set.seed(42)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining,]
  teste <- df[-inTraining,]
  model_knn <- train(
    formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "kknn",
    preProcess = c("center", "scale"),
    trControl = ctrl,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_knn
  )
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_knn, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste <- evaluate_model(model_knn, teste, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  resultados_knn <- bind_rows(resultados_knn, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}
print(resultados_knn)
```

```{r KNN Indices}
resultados_knn_i <- data.frame()

for (nome_dataset in names(datasets_index)) {
  
  df <- datasets_index[[nome_dataset]] %>%
    na.omit()
  
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) < 5 || ncol(df) < 2) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": too few rows or columns")
    next
  }
  
  target <- names(df)[1]
  
  if (is.na(target) || !(target %in% names(df))) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": invalid target")
    next
  }
  
  n_pred <- ncol(df) - 1
  
  if (n_pred < 1) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": no predictors")
    next
  }
  
  set.seed(42)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining, ]
  teste  <- df[-inTraining, ]
  
  if (nrow(teste) < 1) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": no test rows")
    next
  }
  
  # remove near-zero variance predictors
  nzv <- nearZeroVar(treino, saveMetrics = TRUE)
  cols_keep <- rownames(nzv)[!nzv$nzv]
  cols_keep <- union(target, cols_keep)
  
  treino <- treino[, cols_keep, drop = FALSE]
  teste  <- teste[, cols_keep, drop = FALSE]
  
  if (ncol(treino) < 2) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": predictors removed after nearZeroVar")
    next
  }
  
  # KNN cannot use k larger than training set size
  max_k_allowed <- max(1, min(11, nrow(treino) - 1))
  k_vals <- c(3, 5, 7, 9, 11)
  k_vals <- k_vals[k_vals <= max_k_allowed]
  
  if (length(k_vals) == 0) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, ": not enough training rows for KNN")
    next
  }
  
  tune_grid_knn_adapt <- expand.grid(
    kmax = unique(k_vals),
    distance = c(1, 2),
    kernel = c("rectangular", "triangular", "epanechnikov")
  )
  
  model_knn <- train(
    as.formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "kknn",
    preProcess = c("center", "scale"),
    trControl = ctrl,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_knn_adapt
  )
  
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_knn, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste  <- evaluate_model(model_knn, teste,  target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  
  resultados_knn_i <- bind_rows(resultados_knn_i, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}

print(resultados_knn_i)
```


```{r XGBoost Regression Model}

resultados_xgb <- data.frame()
for (nome_dataset in names(datasets)) {
  df <- datasets[[nome_dataset]] %>% na.omit()
  target <- names(df)[1]
  set.seed(123)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining,]
  teste <- df[-inTraining,]
  model_xgb <- train(
    formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "xgbTree",
    trControl = ctrl,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_xgbTree,
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_xgb, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste <- evaluate_model(model_xgb, teste, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  resultados_xgb <- bind_rows(resultados_xgb, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}
print(resultados_xgb)
```

```{r Wrap-up And Exporting Results}
# Adicionar uma coluna indicando o modelo correspondente
resultados_rf$modelo <- "Random Forest"
# resultados_rf_i$modelo <- "Random Forest Indices"
resultados_svm$modelo <- "SVM Radial"
# resultados_svm_i$modelo <- "SVM Radial Indices"
# resultados_knn$modelo <- "kNN"
#resultados_knn_i$modelo <- "kNN Indices"
#resultados_xgb$modelo <- "XGBoost "

# Juntar todas as tabelas em um único dataframe
resultados_finais <- bind_rows(
  resultados_rf,
  # resultados_rf_i,
  resultados_svm,
  # resultados_svm_i,
  # resultados_knn,
  #resultados_knn_i
  #resultados_xgb
)

# Exibir a tabela final consolidada
print(resultados_finais)

# Se quiser salvar em CSV:
write.csv(resultados_finais, "../Output/resultados_noregind1.csv", row.names = FALSE)

resultados_all <- read.csv("../Output/resultados_regnoind.csv")

resultados_all
```

```{r Heatmap}
heat_df <- resultados_all %>%
  separate(Dataset, into = c("dataset_raw", "set"), sep = "-", remove = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    dap = str_extract(dataset_raw, "\\d+"),
    dap = as.numeric(dap),
    variable = str_remove(dataset_raw, "\\d+"),
    variable = case_when(
      variable == "net_photo" ~ "pn",
      TRUE ~ variable
    )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(R2),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) 
```

```{r}
ggplot(heat_df, aes(x = factor(dap), y = set, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 2)), size = 3) +
  facet_grid(metric + modelo ~ variable, scales = "free") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
  labs(
    x = "DAP",
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Value"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
```
```{r}

heat_df2 <- resultados_all %>%
  separate(Dataset, into = c("dataset_raw", "set"), sep = "-", remove = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    dap = str_extract(dataset_raw, "\\d+"),
    dap = as.numeric(dap),
    variable = str_remove(dataset_raw, "\\d+"),
    variable = case_when(
      variable == "net_photo" ~ "pn",
      TRUE ~ variable
    )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(RMSE),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) 

ggplot(heat_df2, aes(x = factor(dap), y = set, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 2)), size = 3) +
  facet_grid(metric + modelo ~ variable, scales = "free") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
  labs(
    x = "DAP",
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Value"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
```


# 6) With Vegetation indices

```{r Metadata list}
datasets_idx <- list(
  ca = list(
    data = ponder_ca,
    target = "ca",
    predictors = index_cols_ca
  ),
  cb = list(
    data = ponder_cb,
    target = "cb",
    predictors = index_cols_cb
  ),
  cx_c = list(
    data = ponder_cx_c,
    target = "cx_c",
    predictors = index_cols_cx_c
  ),
  etr = list(
    data = ponder_etr,
    target = "etr",
    predictors = index_cols_etr
  ),
  gs = list(
    data = ponder_gs,
    target = "gs",
    predictors = index_cols_gs
  ),
  pn = list(
    data = ponder_pn,
    target = "pn",
    predictors = index_cols_pn
  )
)
```

```{r Small helper to prepare each dataset}
prepare_index_dataset <- function(df, target, predictors) {
  keep_cols <- c(target, predictors)
  
  df %>%
    select(any_of(keep_cols)) %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(keep_cols), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(.))))) %>%
    select(where(~ !(is.numeric(.) && all(is.na(.))))) %>%
    na.omit()
}
```

```{r Evaluation function}
evaluate_model <- function(model, dataset, target_name, dataset_name) {
  predicoes <- predict(model, dataset)
  obs <- dataset[[target_name]]
  data.frame(
    Dataset = dataset_name,
    MAE = mean(abs(predicoes - obs)),
    MSE = mean((predicoes - obs)^2),
    RMSE = sqrt(mean((predicoes - obs)^2)),
    R2 = cor(predicoes, obs)^2
  )
}
```

```{r RF Loop adapted}
resultados_rf_idx <- data.frame()

for (nome_dataset in names(datasets_idx)) {
  
  info <- datasets_idx[[nome_dataset]]
  
  df <- prepare_index_dataset(
    df = info$data,
    target = info$target,
    predictors = info$predictors
  )
  
  target <- info$target
  
  set.seed(123)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining, ]
  teste  <- df[-inTraining, ]
  
  model_rf <- train(
    as.formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "ranger",
    trControl = ctrl,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_rf,
    importance = "impurity"
  )
  
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_rf, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste  <- evaluate_model(model_rf, teste,  target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  
  resultados_rf_idx <- bind_rows(resultados_rf_idx, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}

print(resultados_rf_idx)
```

```{r SVM Adapted}
resultados_svm_idx <- data.frame()

for (nome_dataset in names(datasets_idx)) {
  
  info <- datasets_idx[[nome_dataset]]
  
  df <- prepare_index_dataset(
    df = info$data,
    target = info$target,
    predictors = info$predictors
  )
  
  target <- info$target
  
  set.seed(123)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining, ]
  teste  <- df[-inTraining, ]
  
  model_svm <- train(
    as.formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "svmRadial",
    preProcess = c("center", "scale"),
    trControl = ctrl,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_svm
  )
  
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_svm, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste  <- evaluate_model(model_svm, teste,  target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  
  resultados_svm_idx <- bind_rows(resultados_svm_idx, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}

print(resultados_svm_idx)
```

```{r KNN Adapted}
resultados_knn_idx <- data.frame()

for (nome_dataset in names(datasets_idx)) {
  
  info <- datasets_idx[[nome_dataset]]
  
  df <- prepare_index_dataset(
    df = info$data,
    target = info$target,
    predictors = info$predictors
  )
  
  target <- info$target
  
  set.seed(123)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining, ]
  teste  <- df[-inTraining, ]
  
  model_knn <- train(
    as.formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "kknn",
    preProcess = c("center", "scale"),
    trControl = ctrl,
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_knn
  )
  
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_knn, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste  <- evaluate_model(model_knn, teste,  target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  
  resultados_knn_idx <- bind_rows(resultados_knn_idx, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}

print(resultados_knn_idx)
```

```{r}
mutate(across(all_of(keep_cols), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(.)))))
```

```{r}
resultados_rf_idx$Model  <- "RF"
resultados_svm_idx$Model <- "SVM"
resultados_knn_idx$Model <- "KNN"

resultados_all_idx <- bind_rows(
  resultados_rf_idx,
  resultados_svm_idx,
  resultados_knn_idx
)

print(resultados_all_idx)
```

```{r}
daps <- c(74, 75, 81, 82, 89, 109, 112)

# Master specification
dataset_specs <- list(
  ca = list(data = ponder_ca,   target = "ca",   predictors = index_cols_ca),
  cb = list(data = ponder_cb,   target = "cb",   predictors = index_cols_cb),
  cx_c = list(data = ponder_cx_c, target = "cx_c", predictors = index_cols_cx_c),
  etr = list(data = ponder_etr, target = "etr",  predictors = index_cols_etr),
  gs = list(data = ponder_gs,   target = "gs",   predictors = index_cols_gs),
  pn = list(data = ponder_pn,   target = "pn",   predictors = index_cols_pn)
)

# Build all DAP-specific datasets, ready for modeling
datasets_idx_dap <- imap(dataset_specs, function(spec, varname) {
  map(daps, function(d) {
    list(
      data = spec$data %>% filter(dap == d),
      target = spec$target,
      predictors = spec$predictors
    )
  }) %>%
    set_names(paste0(varname, "_", daps))
}) %>%
  flatten()

names(datasets_idx_dap)
```
```{r}
prepare_index_dataset <- function(df, target, predictors) {
  keep_cols <- c(target, predictors)
  
  df %>%
    select(any_of(keep_cols)) %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(keep_cols), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(.))))) %>%
    select(where(~ !(is.numeric(.) && all(is.na(.))))) %>%
    na.omit()
}
```

```{r}
for (nome_dataset in names(datasets_idx_dap)) {

  info <- datasets_idx_dap[[nome_dataset]]

  df <- prepare_index_dataset(
    df = info$data,
    target = info$target,
    predictors = info$predictors
  )

  # 🚨 Skip datasets with too few observations
  if (nrow(df) < 5) {
    message("Skipping ", nome_dataset, " (too few observations)")
    next
  }

  target <- info$target

  set.seed(123)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.8, list = FALSE)

  treino <- df[inTraining, ]
  teste  <- df[-inTraining, ]

  model_rf <- train(
    as.formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "ranger",
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_rf,
    importance = "impurity"
  )

  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_rf, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste  <- evaluate_model(model_rf, teste, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))

  resultados_rf_idx_dap <- bind_rows(resultados_rf_idx_dap, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}
```


```{r}
tune_grid_rf <- expand.grid(mtry = c(2, 3, 4, 5), splitrule = c("variance", "extratrees"), min.node.size = c(1, 5, 10))

resultados_rf_idx_dap <- data.frame()

for (nome_dataset in names(datasets_idx_dap)) {
  
  info <- datasets_idx_dap[[nome_dataset]]
  
  df <- prepare_index_dataset(
    df = info$data,
    target = info$target,
    predictors = info$predictors
  )
  
  # skip empty or tiny datasets
  if (nrow(df) < 10) next
  
  target <- info$target
  
  set.seed(123)
  inTraining <- createDataPartition(df[[target]], p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
  treino <- df[inTraining, ]
  teste  <- df[-inTraining, ]
  
  model_rf <- train(
    as.formula(paste(target, "~ .")),
    data = treino,
    method = "ranger",
    tuneGrid = tune_grid_rf,
    importance = "impurity"
  )
  
  metricas_treino <- evaluate_model(model_rf, treino, target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Treino"))
  metricas_teste  <- evaluate_model(model_rf, teste,  target, paste(nome_dataset, "- Teste"))
  
  resultados_rf_idx_dap <- bind_rows(resultados_rf_idx_dap, metricas_treino, metricas_teste)
}

print(resultados_rf_idx_dap)
```
